signals.npcLine: Crypto tides sink deeper—the market's pulse weakens in this dark netwave.
signals.questPulse: Stabilize rogue crypto nodes amid falling global caps.
signals.worldFeed: Market cap bleeds, shadow traders vanish into fear's grip.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of 'SIREN' surge spike in abandoned blocks.

signals.npcLine: RAVE and AAVE codes flicker; something's stirring beneath the data streams.
signals.questPulse: Extract intel from trending crypto fractures before trace decay.
signals.worldFeed: Signals show new clusters rising amid chaotic falls.
signals.clueEvent: Glitching reports on 'ZRO' token movements detected in darknet relays.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid nodes blinking—possible entry to forbidden vaults.
signals.questPulse: Decode encrypted pulses from 'ASTEROID' to find hidden caches.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto fear spikes as undefined threats loom in market shadows.
signals.clueEvent: 'SIREN' token mentions rise abruptly in black-market chatter.

signals.npcLine: Decrypt signs before the market crash kills all traces.
signals.questPulse: Trace market cap decline to salvage lost credits.
signals.worldFeed: Fear dominates channels; survivors trade whispers like currency.
signals.clueEvent: Fragile links appear in fading 'AAVE' network zones.
